user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Herb Omelette
fields.short_description: A simple, protein-rich omelette with fresh herbs and a touch of butter — a comforting classic egg breakfast.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk 2–3 large eggs with a splash of milk, salt, and pepper. Melt butter in a nonstick skillet over medium heat, pour in the eggs and let them set at the edges. Gently push the set edges toward the center while tilting the pan so uncooked egg flows underneath. When mostly set but still slightly soft, sprinkle with chopped chives and parsley, fold in half, and slide onto a plate. Serve with whole-grain toast and sliced tomato or avocado.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides high-quality protein and vitamin D from eggs; fresh herbs add antioxidants and flavor without extra sodium; whole-grain toast supplies fiber and complex carbohydrates for sustained energy. A balanced, quick breakfast well-suited to Father’s preference for eggs.

result.reasoning: Father likes eggs and Day 4 contains the Smoky Base Pork Dinner; adding this classic egg-based breakfast to Father > Day 4 > Breakfast complements existing options. Position -1 appends it after the current breakfast items.
